sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '中国'), (2, '日本'), (3, '한국');
SELECT id, str, startsWithUTF8(str, '\xe4') AS starts_with_prefix FROM test_strings WHERE starts_with_prefix;
UPDATE test_strings SET str = CONCAT(str, ' - updated') WHERE startsWithUTF8(str, '\xe4');
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE NOT startsWithUTF8(str, '\xe4') ORDER BY id DESC;
